case_title: MOJEED SALAAM et al VS. JOAN ANTHONY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2008 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO SEP-17-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,035.00 FILED BY SALAAM, MOJEED NORRIS, JULIE AS TO DEFENDANT ANTHONY, JOAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALAAM, MOJEED NORRIS, JULIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANTHONY, JOAN $2,457.07 PRINCIPAL, $52.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,509.57, IF PLAINTIFF'S RECEIVED AND HAVE DEPOSITED OR CASHED DEFENDANT'S PREVIOUS PAYMENT DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT FOR THAT PAYMENT.
